title: Beyond IID: How General Are Tabular Foundation Models, Really?
innovation_summary: Beyond IID: How General Are Tabular Foundation Models, Really: To enable unified benchmarking beyond standard benchmarks, we introduce Data Foundry, a Python framework and metadata schema for curating tabular datasets for predictive machine learning.
